rulings.Case Title: COMMUNITY TENANTS' ASSOCIATION ET AL VS. VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint (Amended)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 03, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT GOLDEN PROSPERITIES MANAGMENT COMPANY, LLC, SAMANTHA SETO, KELVIN YEE, SAMANTHA LEE SETO MANAGEMENT, LLC, 371 BROADWAY STREET, LLC, VALSTOCK MANAGEMENT COMPANY, VALSTOCK VENTURES, LLC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Plaintiff'S First Amended Complaint (Amended) is continued to March 23, 2020 for the moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers (except for Exhibits volumes 1-6; the court received these exhibits) and reply. Courtesy copies to be delivered to department 501 no later than March 9, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court received two copies of the opposition papers. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DR. INNOCENT EKEH VS. ALICE BAJWA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 03, 2020 line 11. DEFENDANT ALICE BAJWA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) reconcile allegations in paragraphs 6(b) and 6(f); (2) properly fill out paragraphs 14 and 18 of the Form Complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/CFH)
